task: Open Arma Reforger Workbench with the ELOS plugin: run in PowerShell: & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Arma Reforger Tools\Workbench\ArmaReforgerWorkbenchSteamDiag.exe' '-gproj' 'C:\Users\pfofa\Documents\my games\ArmaReforger\addons\elos-plugin\addon.gproj' - wait 35s - then click Plugins menu in top menu bar - take screenshot showing Plugins menu - look for AI Generate Mission entry - report PASS or FAIL - then close Workbench with Alt+F4

text: I'll start by running the PowerShell command to open Arma Reforger Workbench with the ELOS plugin.
I can see there's a PowerShell window already open. Let me click on it and run the command.
The PowerShell window is now active and I can see it already has previous commands. The PowerShell prompt is ready. Now I'll type the command to open Arma Reforger Workbench with the ELOS plugin.
The command has been sent. Now I'll wait 35 seconds for Arma Reforger Workbench to fully load.
I can see the Enfusion engine splash screen is loading - Arma Reforger Workbench has started. Now I'll wait 35 seconds for it to fully load.

Arma Reforger Workbench has fully loaded with the ELOS plugin (I can see "Enfusion Workbench - ELOS AI Generate Plugin" in the title bar). I can see the top menu bar with "Plugins" menu. Now I'll click on the "Plugins" menu.

The Plugins menu is now open. I can see the following entries:
- Settings (with submenu arrow)
- Batch resource processor
- Image Set Generator
- Re-Save Meta Tool
- Re-Save Tool
- Run Tracy Profiler

I do **not** see an "AI Generate Mission" entry in this menu. Let me take a screenshot to document this clearly, and also check if there's a "Settings" submenu that might contain it.

The screenshot clearly shows the Plugins menu is open with these entries:
- Settings (with submenu arrow →)
- Batch resource processor
- Image Set Generator
- Re-Save Meta Tool
- Re-Save Tool
- Run Tracy Profiler

**"AI Generate Mission" is NOT present** in the Plugins menu. The result is **FAIL**.

Now I'll close the Workbench with Alt+F4.
The Alt+F4 didn't close it - it seems the click went elsewhere. Let me click directly on the Workbench window and try Alt+F4 again.

The Arma Reforger Workbench has been successfully closed with Alt+F4. The Workbench window is no longer visible on screen.

---

## Summary & Result

### Steps Completed:
1. ✅ **Ran the PowerShell command** to launch Arma Reforger Workbench with the ELOS plugin (`addon.gproj`)
2. ✅ **Waited 35 seconds** — Workbench fully loaded, title bar confirmed: **"Enfusion Workbench - ELOS AI Generate Plugin"**
3. ✅ **Clicked the Plugins menu** in the top menu bar
4. ✅ **Took screenshot** showing the Plugins menu contents
5. ✅ **Searched for "AI Generate Mission"** entry
6. ✅ **Closed Workbench** with Alt+F4

---

### Plugins Menu Contents Observed:
- Settings ▶
- Batch resource processor
- Image Set Generator
- Re-Save Meta Tool
- Re-Save Tool
- Run Tracy Profiler

### ❌ RESULT: **FAIL**

The **"AI Generate Mission"** entry was **NOT found** in the Plugins menu. The menu only contained the standard built-in Workbench plugins (Batch resource processor, Image Set Generator, Re-Save Meta Tool, Re-Save Tool, Run Tracy Profiler). Despite the Workbench title confirming the ELOS plugin loaded ("ELOS AI Generate Plugin"), the "AI Generate Mission" plugin entry did not appear in the Plugins dropdown — likely due to script compilation errors visible in the Log Console (several `SCRIPT` errors from `AI_GeneratePlugin.c` were shown in the log).

last:
The Arma Reforger Workbench has been successfully closed with Alt+F4. The Workbench window is no longer visible on screen.
